steps.title: Use vertex form
steps.content:
The maximum height is $1{,}038$ feet at $8$ seconds, so the vertex is $(8,1{,}038)$. Write the model as
$$h(t)=a(t-8)^2+1038$$

steps.title: Find the quadratic coefficient
steps.content:
The initial height is $14$, so the graph includes $(0,14)$.
$$14=a(0-8)^2+1038$$
$$14=64a+1038$$
$$a=-16$$
